title: Public Procurement and Disposal of Public Assets (Registration Fees for Suppliers) Regulations, 2025
title_en: Public Procurement and Disposal of Public Assets (Registration Fees for Suppliers) Regulations, 2025

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Public Procurement and Disposal of Public Assets (Registration Fees for Suppliers) Regulations, 2025.

provisions.title: Registration fees
provisions.content: A supplier shall, upon registration under the Act, pay the fees prescribed in the Schedule.

provisions.title: Revocation
provisions.content: The Public Procurement and Disposal of Public Assets (Registration Fees for Suppliers) Order, is hereby revoked. [G.N. 71 of 2019] Schedule (reg. 2) Registration fees for suppliers Part I – Local suppliers Category (goods and services) Value of procurement contract Fees 1 Up to K10 million K 12,000.00 2 Above K10 million - K30 million K 25,000.00 3 Above K30 million - K80 million K 40,000.00 4 Above K80 million - K100 million K 75,000.00 5 Above K100 million - K500 million K 250,000.00 6 Above K500 million - K1 billion K 500,000.00 7 Above K1 billion K 1,000,000.00 Part II – Foreign suppliers Category Fees Goods USD 2, 000.00 Services USD 1,500.00 Works USD 2, 500.00 History of this document 30 May 2025 this version Published in Government Gazette Supplement 16a Commenced 26 May 2025 Assented to Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About MalawiLII The Malawi Legal Information Institute (MalawiLII) was launched in 2009 as an online resource that provides free access to the laws of Malawi.
